# TODOS — MarketFlux Deferred Scope
<!-- Auto-generated by /autoplan review on 2026-05-27 | Branch: fix/craco-babel-stack-env-port -->

## P0 — Must fix before merging this branch

- [ ] **AUTH: Require auth on copilot write endpoints** — `_resolve_user_id` returns `"local-copilot"` for anonymous users. All anonymous sessions share one trade namespace. Add `_resolve_user_id_required()` that raises 401 on `/chat/stream`, `/trades/*/approve`, `/trades/*/reject`, `/agents` POST/PUT/DELETE. (`copilot_router.py:49`)

- [ ] **ENG: Atomic trade approval mutex** — `execute_pending()` has a TOCTOU race. Replace find + conditional + execute with a single `find_one_and_update({"id": pid, "user_id": uid, "status": "pending"}, {"$set": {"status": "executing"}})`. (`copilot_trades.py:63`)

- [ ] **ENG: TTL index on copilot_pending_trades** — Add at startup: `db.copilot_pending_trades.create_index("created_at", expireAfterSeconds=3600)`. Add staleness guard in `execute_pending()` that rejects trades older than 1 hour with a clear error message. (`server.py:startup`, `copilot_trades.py:63`)

- [ ] **DESIGN: Confirm/Auto toggle explanation** — First-open empty state must show: "Confirm mode is on — agent asks before trading." Expand toggle label from "Confirm"/"Auto" to "Confirm before trade"/"Execute automatically". Add inline callout above suggestions grid, not just tooltip. (`CopilotAgent.js`)

- [ ] **DESIGN: Fix silent stream error state** — Replace `m.content || \`⚠ ${err}\`` with explicit append: always show error inline at end of partial content, styled in amber. Add "Retry last message" button that re-sends the last user message. (`CopilotAgent.js:314`)

- [ ] **DX: SSE reconnect / Last-Event-ID** — Emit `id: {seq}` on every SSE event from `copilot_agent.py`. Add `Last-Event-ID` support in router so streams can resume. On client, handle network drop with a visible "Connection lost — retrying" state + timeout after 30s. (`copilot_agent.py`, `copilot_router.py`, `CopilotAgent.js`)

## P1 — Should fix before public beta

- [ ] **ENG: Pending trade approval queue persists across refresh** — Pending proposals are lost on page reload (ephemeral React state). Either: (a) store pending proposal IDs in localStorage with TTL, or (b) add `GET /api/copilot/trades/pending` endpoint and hydrate on mount. (`copilot_router.py`, `CopilotAgent.js`)

- [ ] **ENG: Standing agent session_id scoped per run** — `_run_instruction` uses `f"standing:{name}"` as session_id. Switch to `f"standing:{agent['id']}:{run_uuid}"` so each run has isolated history. (`copilot_standing.py:103`)

- [ ] **ENG: Strip run_python from standing agent tool list** — Scheduled/autonomous runs do not need a Python scratchpad. Pass `tools=_RESEARCH_TOOLS + _TRADING_TOOLS` (exclude `_CODE_TOOLS`) when `confirm=False` and invoking from standing agent context. Reduces prompt-injection surface. (`copilot_agent.py`, `copilot_standing.py`)

- [ ] **ENG: Rate limit on /api/copilot/chat/stream** — No per-user rate limit on the streaming endpoint. A burst of requests can exhaust the Gemini API key quota. Add a `slowapi` or manual Redis-backed rate limit: max 10 requests/minute per user_id. (`copilot_router.py`)

- [ ] **DX: Unify auth paths** — `CopilotAgent.js` bypasses `api.js` for SSE fetch, creating two separate auth mechanisms. Export `streamCopilot(payload, handlers)` helper from `api.js` that wraps the fetch with the same credentials/token logic as axios. (`src/lib/api.js`, `CopilotAgent.js`)

- [ ] **DX: Enforce confirm=True for anonymous users** — Router must enforce `payload.confirm = True` when `user_id == "local-copilot"` at the router layer, not delegated to the agent. (`copilot_router.py:65`)

- [ ] **DESIGN: StandingAgents run output** — "Run now" expands the agent card inline to show the new run's `lastRun` block with animate-in. If summary is empty, show "No actions taken this run" — never an empty toast. (`StandingAgents.js`)

- [ ] **BACKTEST: NL-to-backtest disclaimers** — Add to backtest results UI: (1) "Results may contain look-ahead bias from NL parsing." (2) yfinance survivorship bias notice. (3) Minimum sample size warning if backtest has < 30 trades. (`Backtest.js`)

## P2 — Pre-launch polish / strategic

- [ ] **STRATEGY: Competitive matrix** — Before next feature sprint, document MarketFlux's one-sentence differentiator vs: Composer.trade (NL backtest), Public.com (always-on agent), Robinhood Strategies (AI portfolio recs). If no clear answer, pause feature work and run an /office-hours session.

- [ ] **STRATEGY: Live trading path** — Document the regulatory and data licensing roadmap: (a) FINRA registration or broker partnership, (b) real-time data licensing (not yfinance), (c) compliance infrastructure. Not an engineering task — business/legal prerequisite.

- [ ] **DX: API namespace** — Rename `/api/pilot/*` → `/api/copilot/v1/proposals` or document the split clearly in `api.js` JSDoc and `docs/api-namespaces.md`. (`copilot_router.py`, `TradingCopilotPanel.js`)

- [ ] **UI: Multi-model picker** — Consider moving the model selector out of the user-facing header into a Developer Settings panel. Users want the best answer; they don't want to pick an LLM. Keep the backend abstraction for internal A/B use.

- [ ] **TEST: Copilot test suite** — Zero automated tests for all new copilot features. Need at minimum: trade staging idempotency test, standing agent run isolation test, auth fallback behavior test, memory inject test. (`tests/test_copilot_*.py`)

- [ ] **BRANCH: Rename** — Branch `fix/craco-babel-stack-env-port` contains a full feature build. Rename to `feat/trading-copilot` before creating the PR, or note this in the PR description.
